description: CompositionWhite round neck short-sleeved t-shirt made of 100% cotton, has blue fabric tape on the inseam of the neckline, graphic print and lettering on the front with brand name and logo on the back of the neckFittingRegularWash care Gentle machine wash in lukewarm water at 40 degrees Do not bleach Tumble dry at low temperature Warm iron Do not dry clean This white tee from puma is made for girls with oodles of attitude. Let your confidence shine through this smart t-shirt as you don it with jeans or shorts and chic sneakers or canvas shoes. A star has arrived!Model statisticsThe model wears size M in t-shirtsHeight-5.6", Chest-32"
